MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHLESINGER BROS. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-09-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

3:00 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULTAION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLTAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT AS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT VICTORIA HALL FOR THE RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 3250 WEBSTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. BY 12:00 P.M. ON 11/30/93. PLTF. WAVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE SUBJECT PREMISE BY 11/30/93, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH A POSITIVE REFERENCE. NO NEGITATIVE REFERENCE TO BE GIVEN CONCERNING DEFENDANT VICTORIA HALL. SHOULD DEFENDANT VICTORIA HALL FAIL TO VACATE BY 12:00 P.M. ON 11/30/93, THEN JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTERED TOGETHER WITH MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE SUM OF $3,738.00 REPRESENTING PAST DUE RENT OF JUNE, JULY, AUGUST, SEPTEMBER, OCTOBER AND NOVEMBER, 1993. HOWEVER, IF DEFENDANT HAS VACATED THE SUBJECT PREMISE BY THE DATE AND TIME GIVEN ABOVE, PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AND SHALL NOT FILE A STIPULATED JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-02-1993 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
